info.title: Local Friendly Marketplace API
info.description: REST API for local friendly marketplace backend

Bearer.name: Authorization
Bearer.description: JWT token in the format: Bearer <token>

post.description: Create a new user account with email and password
Authenticate user and return JWT token
Add a new product to marketplace (seller/admin only)

get.description: Retrieve nearby stores based on coordinates

post.description: Create a new order with items

get.description: Retrieve orders for a specific user

put.description: Update the status of an order

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status (pending, confirmed, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled, refunded)

400.description: Order ID and status are required
